query:
INSERT INTO stamp_transactions (userId, orderId, action, stamps, description)
SELECT st.userId, st.orderId, 'deduct', -st.stamps, 'Stamps deducted - order cancelled (manual fix)'
FROM stamp_transactions st
JOIN users u ON st.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Rangan%' AND st.action = 'earn';
